message:
Running command: # SYNTHESIS DONE! Step 08 = pre-PnR STA completing corners.
# Next: floorplan -> PDN -> IO placement -> GlobalPlacement (the critical step!)
# Tight 2-min polling to catch GlobalPlacement success/failure quickly.
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
LOG="/tmp/librelane_final.log"
LR_PID=363476

echo "STA done, watching for GlobalPlacement..."

for i in $(seq 1 480); do
  sleep 120

  LR_ALIVE=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o pid --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  ELAPSED=$(ps -p $LR_PID -o etime --no-headers 2>/dev/null | xargs)
  STEP=$(ls -t "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep "^[0-9]" | head -1)
  STEP_COUNT=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/" 2>/dev/null | grep -c "^[0-9]" || echo 0)
  LOG_BYTES=$(stat -c%s "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)
  LOG_TAIL=$(tail -1 "$LOG" 2>/dev/null | xargs | cut -c1-80)
  FINAL_GDS=$(ls "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/gds/"*.gds 2>/dev/null | head -1)
  ERRORS=$(grep -c "ERROR" "$LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo 0)

  echo "[$(date '+%H:%M:%S')] LR=${LR_ALIVE:-DONE}(${ELAPSED}) step=$STEP (#${STEP_COUNT}) log=$(numfmt --to=iec $LOG_BYTES 2>/dev/null) ERR=$ERRORS"
  echo "  $LOG_TAIL"
  [ -n "$FINAL_GDS" ] && echo "  *** FINAL GDS: $FINAL_GDS ***"
  echo ""

  if [ -z "$LR_ALIVE" ]; then
    echo "=== LibreLane EXITED ==="
    ls -lt "$WRAPPER_RUN/" | head -60
    echo ""
    find "$WRAPPER_RUN/final/" 2>/dev/null | sort | head -40
    echo ""
    tail -80 "$LOG"
    break
  fi
done

message.content: **Excellent!** Synthesis is **complete** — 16 MB netlist written at 11:19! The flow is now at **step 08 (pre-PnR STA)** and completing timing corners. GlobalPlacement is next.

function.name: execute_bash
